TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Khpan = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Khpan. 30 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 91 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 80 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal75%, Amis3%, ni rahuq na o10%. Ngayan alang Alang Tawan(Khpan) Snnaaxan alang Alang thunac ba Rofucun. Rofuri Fosinci Tawyensu.Tgnarac na Lahawsan. Deheran mkteetu knbrawan 600 m, maha 600 m hari ka Haypa na. Nluwan alang Tayalcu Srengo kari Pskari Tatayal, kari Pllmukan. Pntheruy alang Gameniq tghunac na Rofucun ka alang Tawan. Knkawas 55 bobo daan rulu Hongkuwan Kongru ka tgdaya na, kndalax Kawpo, Nekuhuwe ma oda lhengo Sanso msuupu mtheruy. Anu daan kingal qiril paru na ayus Sipuro. Kiya tnngayun Tawan. Alang tghunac ba Rofu. Kklaan ssaan Sprigi Hako Mrulun Rofu Pnheyu knkawas 93, idas 7 niqal pnldaxan keeman ma ooda kksaan sseediq. Pnldaxan knbmalu ba ttaan sprigo keeman. Kuxul ba ssaan mtheyaq mprigo ma ppsingan peni. Sprigo sapah ttinan Kana qyqeya stinun, ma ndaan tnninun nrudan Tayal ka Sprigo. Ayus Tasil Paru Truma na Hako Rofu ma Hako Fusin, daan Tahansi. Dheran Ayus Tasil Paru knpparu mglahang pnkdere.
S.PHON: = kńßpan = gaga mniq tawju…ônsu *usiŇč ¶ju ka alaŇč kńßpan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o**%. Ňčajan alaŇč alaŇč tawan(kńßpan) snnaaxan alaŇč alaŇč tńßuna ¶ ba …ĺo*u ¶un. …ĺo*u…ĺi *osin ¶i tawj…ônsu.tgna…ĺa ¶ na lańßawsan. d…ôńß…ô…ĺan mkt…ô…ôtu knb…ĺawan *** m, mańßa *** m ńßa…ĺi ka ńßajpa na. nluwan alaŇč tajal ¶u s…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi pska…ĺi tatajal, ka…ĺi pllmukan. pntńß…ô…ĺuj alaŇč gam…ôniq tgńßuna ¶ na …ĺo*u ¶un ka alaŇč tawan. knkawas ** bobo daan …ĺulu ńßoŇčkuwan koŇč…ĺu ka tgdaja na, kndalax kawpo, n…ôkuńßuw…ô ma oda lńß…ôŇčo sanso msuupu mtńß…ô…ĺuj. anu daan kiŇčal qi…ĺil pa…ĺu na ajus sipu…ĺo. kija tnŇčajun tawan. alaŇč tgńßuna ¶ ba …ĺo*u. kklaan ssaan sp…ĺigi ńßako m…ĺulun …ĺo*u pnńß…ôu knkawas **, idas * niqal pnldaxan k…ô…ôman ma ooda kksaan ss…ô…ôdiq. pnldaxan knbmalu ba ttaan sp…ĺigo k…ô…ôman. kuxul ba ssaan mtńß…ôaq mp…ĺigo ma ppsiŇčan p…ôni. sp…ĺigo sapańß ttinan kana qjq…ôa stinun, ma ndaan tnninun n…ĺudan tajal ka sp…ĺigo. ajus tasil pa…ĺu t…ĺuma na ńßako …ĺo*u ma ńßako *usin, daan tańßansi. dńß…ô…ĺan ajus tasil pa…ĺu knppa…ĺu mglańßaŇč pnkd…ô…ĺ…ô.
S.FORM: = Khpan = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Khpan. 30 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 91 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 80 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal75%, Amis3%, ni rahuq na o10%. Ngayan alang Alang Tawan(Khpan) Snnaaxan alang Alang thunac ba Rofucun. Rofuri Fosinci Tawyensu.Tgnarac na Lahawsan. Deheran mkteetu knbrawan 600 m, maha 600 m hari ka Haypa na. Nluwan alang Tayalcu Srengo kari Pskari Tatayal, kari Pllmukan. Pntheruy alang Gameniq tghunac na Rofucun ka alang Tawan. Knkawas 55 bobo daan rulu Hongkuwan Kongru ka tgdaya na, kndalax Kawpo, Nekuhuwe ma oda lhengo Sanso msuupu mtheruy. Anu daan kingal qiril paru na ayus Sipuro. Kiya tnngayun Tawan. Alang tghunac ba Rofu. Kklaan ssaan Sprigi Hako Mrulun Rofu Pnheyu knkawas 93, idas 7 niqal pnldaxan keeman ma ooda kksaan sseediq. Pnldaxan knbmalu ba ttaan sprigo keeman. Kuxul ba ssaan mtheyaq mprigo ma ppsingan peni. Sprigo sapah ttinan Kana qyqeya stinun, ma ndaan tnninun nrudan Tayal ka Sprigo. Ayus Tasil Paru Truma na Hako Rofu ma Hako Fusin, daan Tahansi. Dheran Ayus Tasil Paru knpparu mglahang pnkdere.
S.PHON: = kńßpan = gaga mniq tawju…ônsu *usiŇč ¶ju ka alaŇč kńßpan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o**%. Ňčajan alaŇč alaŇč tawan(kńßpan) snnaaxan alaŇč alaŇč tńßuna ¶ ba …ĺo*u ¶un. …ĺo*u…ĺi *osin ¶i tawj…ônsu.tgna…ĺa ¶ na lańßawsan. d…ôńß…ô…ĺan mkt…ô…ôtu knb…ĺawan *** m, mańßa *** m ńßa…ĺi ka ńßajpa na. nluwan alaŇč tajal ¶u s…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi pska…ĺi tatajal, ka…ĺi pllmukan. pntńß…ô…ĺuj alaŇč gam…ôniq tgńßuna ¶ na …ĺo*u ¶un ka alaŇč tawan. knkawas ** bobo daan …ĺulu ńßoŇčkuwan koŇč…ĺu ka tgdaja na, kndalax kawpo, n…ôkuńßuw…ô ma oda lńß…ôŇčo sanso msuupu mtńß…ô…ĺuj. anu daan kiŇčal qi…ĺil pa…ĺu na ajus sipu…ĺo. kija tnŇčajun tawan. alaŇč tgńßuna ¶ ba …ĺo*u. kklaan ssaan sp…ĺigi ńßako m…ĺulun …ĺo*u pnńß…ôu knkawas **, idas * niqal pnldaxan k…ô…ôman ma ooda kksaan ss…ô…ôdiq. pnldaxan knbmalu ba ttaan sp…ĺigo k…ô…ôman. kuxul ba ssaan mtńß…ôaq mp…ĺigo ma ppsiŇčan p…ôni. sp…ĺigo sapańß ttinan kana qjq…ôa stinun, ma ndaan tnninun n…ĺudan tajal ka sp…ĺigo. ajus tasil pa…ĺu t…ĺuma na ńßako …ĺo*u ma ńßako *usin, daan tańßansi. dńß…ô…ĺan ajus tasil pa…ĺu knppa…ĺu mglańßaŇč pnkd…ô…ĺ…ô.
